name: milletsmomo_an_order
description: PWA order tracking app for a momo shop

scripts.local:setup: docker compose up -d sqlserver && cross-env NODE_ENV=development npm run db:wait -w apps/backend && cross-env NODE_ENV=development npm run db:create -w apps/backend && cross-env NODE_ENV=development npm run db:migrate -w apps/backend
scripts.local:dev: concurrently -n fe,be -c cyan,green "npm run dev:frontend" "cross-env NODE_ENV=development npm run dev -w apps/backend"
scripts.prod:setup: cross-env NODE_ENV=production npm run db:migrate -w apps/backend
scripts.dev: concurrently -n fe,be -c cyan,green "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/frontend && npm run build -w apps/backend
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p packages/shared/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p apps/backend/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p apps/frontend/tsconfig.json
